items.label: Hmbown/DeepSeek-TUI
items.summary: 该项目是一款专为DeepSeek模型打造的终端原生编程智能体。其核心创新在于摒弃重型IDE插件，将AI代码交互深度嵌入命令行工作流。技术上通过轻量级接口实现模型调用，降低资源占用与上下文切换成本。对AI产品经理而言，该产品验证了“终端优先”AI工具的可行性，为开发者赛道提供了低门槛、高集成度的轻量化Agent落地范式，具备较强的极客生态渗透价值。

items.label: Dessn raises $6M for its production focused design tool
items.summary: Dessn获600万美元融资，致力于开发直接对接生产级代码库的AI设计工具。该产品核心创新在于打破设计与开发间的交付壁垒，通过AI实时解析并同步生产环境代码，实现设计稿与前端组件的精准映射。对AI产品经理而言，其商业价值在于显著降低设计还原成本与沟通损耗，推动“设计即代码”工作流落地，为AI赋能研发协同提供了高价值切入点。

items.label: Routers Learn the Geometry of Their Experts: Geometric Coupling in Sparse Mixtur
items.summary: 该论文针对稀疏混合专家（SMoE）大模型训练中常见的“路由坍缩”与“负载均衡损失削弱专家专业性”痛点，提出“几何耦合”机制。研究发现路由器能自主学习专家的几何分布特征，从而优化路由决策。对AI产品经理而言，该技术可显著提升大模型训练稳定性与推理效率，在保持模型高专业性的同时降低算力成本，为下一代高效、可扩展的商用大模型架构提供关键技术支撑。

items.label: Dessn raises $6M for its production focused design tool
items.summary: Dessn获600万美元融资，致力于开发直接对接生产级代码库的AI设计工具。该产品核心创新在于打破设计与开发间的交付壁垒，通过AI实时解析并同步生产环境代码，实现设计稿与前端组件的精准映射。对AI产品经理而言，其商业价值在于显著降低设计还原成本与沟通损耗，推动“设计即代码”工作流落地，为AI赋能研发协同提供了高价值切入点。

items.label: Israel's AI targeting system: how data from a phone become a death sentence
items.summary: 本文剖析以色列军方AI目标定位系统如何将海量手机元数据与通信记录转化为打击清单。技术核心在于多源数据实时融合、自动化模式识别与预测建模。对AI产品经理而言，该案例凸显了高并发数据流水线的工程价值，同时警示高风险决策中“人在回路”机制、算法可解释性及伦理安全护栏的必要性，为构建可信、可审计的AI决策支持产品提供关键参考。

items.label: Pion: A Spectrum-Preserving Optimizer via Orthogonal Equivalence Transformation
items.summary: Pion是一款面向大模型训练的新型优化器，采用正交等价变换替代传统加法更新，通过左右正交矩阵更新权重并保持奇异值谱不变。该技术显著提升训练稳定性与收敛效率，降低算力成本。对AI产品经理而言，Pion为底层训练基建提供高效算法选项，有助于缩短模型迭代周期、优化算力预算，为构建高性能AI应用提供底层支撑。

items.label: Show HN: Statewright – Visual state machines that make AI agents reliable
items.summary: Statewright 是一款面向 AI Agent 开发的可视化状态机工具，旨在解决大模型行为不可控与调试困难的痛点。通过将智能体工作流抽象为确定性状态转移图，产品团队可直观设计、监控与干预多步任务流程，显著提升复杂场景下的执行可靠性与可观测性。该方案降低了 Agent 架构设计门槛，提供标准化流程管控能力，有助于加速高稳定性企业级智能体产品的商业化落地。

items.label: Google’s ‘Create My Widget’ feature will let you vibe-code you
items.summary: To create a widget, users will be able to describe what they want using natural language. For example, you could ask the feature to "suggest three high-protein meal prep recipes every week" in order to get a custom dashboard that you can add and resize on your home screen.

items.label: Reward Hacking in Rubric-Based Reinforcement Learning
items.summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards has enabled strong post-training gains in domains such as math and coding, though many open-ended settings rely on rubric-based rewards. We study reward hacking in rubric-based RL, where a policy is optimized against a training verifier but evaluated ag

items.label: ToolCUA: Towards Optimal GUI-Tool Path Orchestration for Computer Use Agents
items.summary: Computer Use Agents (CUAs) can act through both atomic GUI actions, such as click and type, and high-level tool calls, such as API-based file operations, but this hybrid action space often leaves them uncertain about when to continue with GUI actions or switch to tools, leading to suboptimal executi

items.label: KV-Fold: One-Step KV-Cache Recurrence for Long-Context Inference
items.summary: We introduce KV-Fold, a simple, training-free long-context inference protocol that treats the key-value (KV) cache as the accumulator in a left fold over sequence chunks. At each step, the model processes the next chunk conditioned on the accumulated cache, appends the newly produced keys and values

items.label: AlphaGRPO: Unlocking Self-Reflective Multimodal Generation in UMMs via Decomposi
items.summary: In this paper, we propose AlphaGRPO, a novel framework that applies Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to AR-Diffusion Unified Multimodal Models (UMMs) to enhance multimodal generation capabilities without an additional cold-start stage. Our approach unlocks the model's intrinsic potential to

items.label: Task-Adaptive Embedding Refinement via Test-time LLM Guidance
items.summary: We explore the effectiveness of an LLM-guided query refinement paradigm for extending the usability of embedding models to challenging zero-shot search and classification tasks. Our approach refines the embedding representation of a user query using feedback from a generative LLM on a small set of d

items.label: Elastic Attention Cores for Scalable Vision Transformers
items.summary: Vision Transformers (ViTs) achieve strong data-driven scaling by leveraging all-to-all self-attention. However, this flexibility incurs a computational cost that scales quadratically with image resolution, limiting ViTs in high-resolution domains. Underlying this approach is the assumption that pair

items.label: Learning, Fast and Slow: Towards LLMs That Adapt Continually
items.summary: Large language models (LLMs) are trained for downstream tasks by updating their parameters (e.g., via RL). However, updating parameters forces them to absorb task-specific information, which can result in catastrophic forgetting and loss of plasticity. In contrast, in-context learning with fixed LLM

items.label: OmniNFT: Modality-wise Omni Diffusion Reinforcement for Joint Audio-Video Genera
items.summary: Recent advances in joint audio-video generation have been remarkable, yet real-world applications demand strong per-modality fidelity, cross-modal alignment, and fine-grained synchronization. Reinforcement Learning (RL) offers a promising paradigm, but its extension to multi-objective and multi-moda

items.label: Beyond GRPO and On-Policy Distillation: An Empirical Sparse-to-Dense Reward Prin
items.summary: In settings where labeled verifiable training data is the binding constraint, each checked example should be allocated carefully. The standard practice is to use this data directly on the model that will be deployed, for example by running GRPO on the deployment student. We argue that this is often

items.label: MEME: Multi-entity & Evolving Memory Evaluation
items.summary: LLM-based agents increasingly operate in persistent environments where they must store, update, and reason over information across many sessions. While prior benchmarks evaluate only single-entity updates, MEME defines six tasks spanning the full space defined by the multi-entity and evolving axes,
